name: ChangeDeliveryDetails
description: Customer needs to change the date, time, address, or other details of an upcoming Virgin Media delivery or installation — they want to modify when or where their order arrives. This is a pre-delivery modification, not a report of a delivery problem or a request to cancel the order.

Change my delivery {changeDeliveryDetailsType} please
